message:
fix(ci): Add model download to unit-tests job and sync JS to examples

- Add MiniLM model download and cache to unit-tests job
- Sync built JS files (lanceql.js, lanceql-worker.js) to examples/wasm/ in both jobs
- Ensures auto-load model fix is available in examples/wasm/lanceql.js

files.patch:
@@ -40,11 +40,32 @@ jobs:
         working-directory: packages/browser
         run: npm install
 
-      - name: Build with esbuild and copy WASM
+      - name: Build with esbuild and sync to examples
         working-directory: packages/browser
         run: |
           node esbuild.config.js
           cp ../../zig-out/bin/lanceql.wasm dist/
+          cp dist/lanceql.wasm ../../examples/wasm/
+          cp dist/lanceql-worker.js ../../examples/wasm/
+          cp dist/lanceql.esm.js ../../examples/wasm/lanceql.js
+
+      - name: Cache MiniLM model
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: examples/wasm/models
+          key: minilm-model-v1
+
+      - name: Download MiniLM model
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p examples/wasm/models
+          if [ ! -f examples/wasm/models/minilm-l6-v2.gguf ]; then
+            echo "Downloading MiniLM model..."
+            curl -L -o examples/wasm/models/minilm-l6-v2.gguf \
+              https://data.metal0.dev/models/minilm-l6-v2.gguf
+          else
+            echo "MiniLM model cached"
+          fi
+          ls -la examples/wasm/models/
 
       - name: Install Playwright browsers
         working-directory: packages/browser
@@ -81,9 +102,12 @@ jobs:
         working-directory: packages/browser
         run: npm install
 
-      - name: Build browser package
+      - name: Build browser package and sync to examples
         working-directory: packages/browser
-        run: node esbuild.config.js
+        run: |
+          node esbuild.config.js
+          cp dist/lanceql-worker.js ../../examples/wasm/
+          cp dist/lanceql.esm.js ../../examples/wasm/lanceql.js
 
       - name: Cache MiniLM model
         uses: actions/cache@v4
